full_text:
Han ?
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han ?was born in Yingchuan. Attacked by Zhu Huan after his father surrendered, both legs were broken. Han ? was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty and Yuan Shao.
